title: Kamerbrief Actieprogramma Duurzame Digitalisering 2026-2028
note: The deliberately unstructured case: a flowing ministerial letter with almost no headings. Tests whether the pipeline imposes structure the source does not supply.
licence: Rijksoverheid / open.overheid.nl -- public-domain equivalent (Wet hergebruik overheidsinformatie).
expectedCharacteristics: Imposes an arc (aanleiding -> kern -> vervolgstappen) on a letter that has no headings
Turns prose sentences into discrete bullets without inventing numbered action items that are not in the letter
Preserves the formal register and correct actor attribution (minister, ministerie, Tweede Kamer)
